nasb.text: Thus says the king, ‘Do not let Hezekiah deceive you, for he will not be able to deliver you;

esv.text: Thus says the king: ‘Do not let Hezekiah deceive you, for he will not be able to deliver you.

cnv.text: 王這樣說：‘你們不要被希西家欺騙了，因為他決不能拯救你們；

ccb.text: 王说，‘你们不要被希西迦欺骗，他不能救你们。

csbs.text: 王如此说：‘不要让希西加欺哄你们，因为他不能解救你们；
